home.hero_subtitle: Thousands of exclusive tracks created by independent artists. For your videos, podcasts, ads and creative projects.
home.feature1_desc: Every track is created exclusively for Lalason by our independent artists.
home.feature2_desc: One simple licence, valid for life on all your past and future productions.
home.feature3_desc: YouTube, Instagram, podcasts, shops, restaurants, ads and much more.
home.testimonial1_text: Since I started using Lalason, zero Content ID claims. The YouTube whitelist is a game changer.
home.testimonial2_text: The quality of the tracks is stunning. My listeners regularly ask where the music comes from.
home.testimonial3_text: We wanted a unique musical atmosphere, not generic playlists. Lalason is a perfect fit.
home.testimonial4_text: I edit 3 to 4 videos per week. Having access to a catalogue of original music without worrying about rights is a huge time saver.
home.about_text: The adventure began in 2018 around a shared passion: music. With our favourite instruments — the saxophone and the djembe — we started creating royalty-free music under the name Vendredi. 100 million plays later, we wanted to help independent artists emerge and give them a platform. Lalason was born.
home.artists_subtitle: Independent artists who create original music, exclusively for Lalason.
home.cta_subtitle: Join the creators who trust Lalason.

faq.pageDescription: Find answers to the most common questions about Lalason.
faq.a1: Lalason is an original royalty-free music library created by independent artists. Subscribers can download and use tracks in their productions without worrying about copyright claims.
faq.a2: Lalason is designed for content creators (YouTube, Instagram, podcasts), businesses (shops, restaurants, hotels) and anyone needing music for their projects.
faq.q3: What is the difference between the Creators and Boutique plans?
faq.a3: The Creators plan covers online platforms (YouTube, Instagram, podcasts, digital advertising). The Boutique plan covers public broadcast in physical venues (shops, restaurants, hotels, etc.).
faq.q4: Can I use the music on YouTube without receiving a claim?
faq.a4: Yes. Creators subscribers benefit from a YouTube whitelist that protects their channels against Content ID claims on Lalason tracks.
faq.q5: How does the YouTube whitelist work?
faq.a5: After subscribing, go to your member area and enter your YouTube Channel ID. We add your channel to our whitelist within 48 hours.
faq.q6: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
faq.a6: Yes, you can cancel from your member area via the Stripe portal. Your access remains active until the end of the paid period.
faq.q7: Are the tracks exclusive to Lalason?
faq.a7: Yes. All tracks are created exclusively for Lalason and are not available on other royalty-free music platforms.
